CLUBELO_RESIDUAL.reason: Main branch still exposes the superseded r1 history receipt. Corrected bounded-concurrency r2 execution has been launched, but no completed r2 aggregate is yet available.
CLUBELO_RESIDUAL.reopen_trigger: A complete r2 history aggregate plus match-level PIT coverage and residual OOF receipt becomes available without changing frozen beta profiles or coverage gates.

GDELT_CONTEXT.reason: Main branch still exposes the superseded aggregate-r1 with material HTTP 429 failures. The exact-kickoff, recursive-window and fail-closed r2 workflow is launched but has not completed.
GDELT_CONTEXT.reopen_trigger: A complete or auditable partial r2 aggregate establishes real per-domain prematch coverage with rate-limit and timestamp diagnostics.

main_research_priority.highest: prospective genuine PIT market evidence for frozen competition-specific unified-matrix challengers

governance: Incomplete external sources must not be promoted, assigned nonzero weight, or used to delay already executable prospective market evidence collection. They may re-enter research only after their own frozen evidence gates complete.
